title: bidens cynapiifolia
intro: Bidens cynapiifolia, also known as Burr Marigold or Cleft Burr Marigold, is a perennial plant species in the aster family native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which are said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In addition, Burr Marigold has been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties.
